<HUAWEI-SWITCH-PEER3>display interface description
Interface                     PHY     Protocol Description
Eth-Trunk1                    up      up       to_SH-CE12808-DSW-03_Eth-Trunk1
Eth-Trunk2                    up      up       to_SH-CE12808-DSW-04_Eth-Trunk2
GigabitEthernet0/0/1          up      up       to_SH-CE6850-ACC-02_GE0/0/1

<HUAWEI-SWITCH-PEER3>display ip routing-table pro bgp
Proto: Protocol        Pre: Preference
Route Flags: R - relay, D - download to fib, T - to vpn-instance, B - black hole route
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Routing Table : _public_
         Destinations : 3        Routes : 4
Destination/Mask    Proto   Pre  Cost        Flags NextHop                                  Interface
       10.0.0.0/24  BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.1                                Eth-Trunk1
                    BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.2                                Eth-Trunk2
      10.0.1.0/24  IBGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.3                             GigabitEthernet0/0/1
      10.0.2.0/24  EBGP  60   100           RD  192.168.1.5                             GigabitEthernet0/0/1
